caption: A person's hands are shown working on a crafting project on a white gridded surface. The individual wears a black watch on their left wrist and rings on their fingers. They are assembling a card using a brown cardstock base and decorative paper with a green, gold, and white floral pattern. In the initial frames, the person presses a rectangular piece of the patterned paper onto the brown cardstock. In subsequent frames, they adjust the placement of the patterned paper and a thin strip of the same decorative paper. Various crafting supplies are scattered around the workspace, including a white ink pad labeled "MEMEN" and a stamp set with the text "BIRTHDAY" and "is filled with all the best things!". A watermark reading "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
